sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 54:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 54:1
items.html: The screen that was refined from the Guf of SAG consists of two phases of records: records of tastes and records of dots. For the Nekudim, there was a coupling on the phases of the dots incorporated in the screen, which are the phases of the lower nine of SAG, and see answer No. 66. (Inner Light, Item 6)
